creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Hi,

It's been over two weeks since this PR has been submitted and put in 
feedback state awaiting your approval. If do not hear from you I will 
commit the patch. Please reply as soon as convenient to let me know if you 
approve.


-- 
Cheers,
